blurb: Mistral AI is a European frontier AI lab (open-weight and commercial LLMs, assistants, agents) headquartered in Paris with UK/London commercial presence, often cited in European AI-sovereignty discussions.

publications.title: AI Now Summit 2026
publications.summary: Mistral's AI Now Summit 2026 — a company event framed around AI 'innovations for global enterprises'; relevant as a European-frontier-lab convening signal rather than a pure product launch.

news.title: Bringing more control over your connectors

news.title: Introducing Mistral OCR 4
news.summary: Mistral ships OCR 4, a document-intelligence model. Notable that Mistral pairs product cadence with a 'sovereign European frontier lab' positioning relevant to EU AI-Act and compute-sovereignty debates.

notes: Harvested 2026-06-27 via OpenClaw headless browser (mistral.ai/news passed cleanly; untested by web_fetch this morning). Mistral's news feed is overwhelmingly product/model launches (OCR 4 'June 23 2026', connectors 'June 24 2026', Vibe agent, Search Toolkit) — low policy signal. Logged only the AI Now Summit (convening/positioning signal) with its inline date 'May 28, 2026'. Omitted the product launches per SOUL signal discipline. As a European frontier lab, Mistral is worth watching for sovereignty/EU-AI-Act positioning; will log policy submissions or named-author governance posts if/when they appear. ROLES (2026-06-27 ATS): Mistral is hiring a sizeable EMEA legal bench (8 counsel roles, Paris). Logged the two with the clearest policy/regulatory remit — Privacy Legal Counsel and Product Regulatory Legal Counsel (EU) — as EU-AI-Act/privacy signal; omitted the M&A/banking/compute commercial-counsel roles as non-policy.
